caseNameFull: Walling, Administrator of the Wage and Hour Division, U. S. Department of Labor, v. Harnischfeger Corporation
attorneys: Mr. Irving J. Levy, with whom Assistant Solicitor Hugh B. Cox, Messrs. Ralph F. Fuchs, Douglas B. Maggs and Archibald Cox were on the brief, for petitioner., Mr. Leo Mann, with whom Messrs. Louis Quarles and Maxwell H. Herriott were on the brief, for respondent.
